Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal

Class Rule<T extends Predicate>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.Rule<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
Rule.BinaryRule, Rule.Expr, Rule.Hypothesis, Rule.UnaryRule
public class Rule<T extends Predicate> extends Object
Class used for reasoner which condense several inference rules in a single ProofRule. This class helps to ensure that the final inference rule is valid. It is used by reasoner MembershipGoal for instance.

Instances of this class are immutable.
